tools.name: projects.cloudiotProjectsLocationsRegistriesBindDeviceToGateway
tools.description: Associates the device with the gateway.

tools.name: projects.cloudiotProjectsLocationsRegistriesCreate
tools.description: Creates a device registry that contains devices.

tools.name: projects.cloudiotProjectsLocationsRegistriesDevicesConfigVersionsList
tools.description: Lists the last few versions of the device configuration in descending order (i.e.: newest first).

tools.name: projects.cloudiotProjectsLocationsRegistriesDevicesCreate
tools.description: Creates a device in a device registry.

tools.name: projects.cloudiotProjectsLocationsRegistriesDevicesModifyCloudToDeviceConfig
tools.description: Modifies the configuration for the device, which is eventually sent from the Cloud IoT Core servers. Returns the modified configuration version and its metadata.

tools.name: projects.cloudiotProjectsLocationsRegistriesDevicesSendCommandToDevice
tools.description: Sends a command to the specified device. In order for a device to be able to receive commands, it must: 1) be connected to Cloud IoT Core using the MQTT protocol, and 2) be subscribed to the group of MQTT topics specified by /devices/{device-id}/commands/#. This subscription will receive commands at the top-level topic /devices/{device-id}/commands as well as commands for subfolders, like /devices/{device-id}/commands/subfolder. Note that subscribing to specific subfolders is not supported. If the command could not be delivered to the device, this method will return an error; in particular, if the device is not subscribed, this method will return FAILED_PRECONDITION. Otherwise, this method will return OK. If the subscription is QoS 1, at least once delivery will be guaranteed; for QoS 0, no acknowledgment will be expected from the device.

tools.name: projects.cloudiotProjectsLocationsRegistriesDevicesStatesList
tools.description: Lists the last few versions of the device state in descending order (i.e.: newest first).

tools.name: projects.cloudiotProjectsLocationsRegistriesGroupsDevicesList
tools.description: List devices in a device registry.

tools.name: projects.cloudiotProjectsLocationsRegistriesGroupsGetIamPolicy
tools.description: Gets the access control policy for a resource. Returns an empty policy if the resource exists and does not have a policy set.

tools.name: projects.cloudiotProjectsLocationsRegistriesGroupsSetIamPolicy
tools.description: Sets the access control policy on the specified resource. Replaces any existing policy.

tools.name: projects.cloudiotProjectsLocationsRegistriesGroupsTestIamPermissions
tools.description: Returns permissions that a caller has on the specified resource. If the resource does not exist, this will return an empty set of permissions, not a NOT_FOUND error.

tools.name: projects.cloudiotProjectsLocationsRegistriesUnbindDeviceFromGateway
tools.description: Deletes the association between the device and the gateway.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
